description:
The iptables-persistent package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install iptables-persistent
rationale:
A method of configuring and maintaining firewall rules is
necessary to configure a Host Based Firewall.
ocil_clause: the iptables-persistent package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the iptables-persistent package is installed: 
$ rpm -q iptables-persistent
fixtext:
The iptables-persistent package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install iptables-persistent
title: Install iptables-persistent Package
